title: polypodium dichotomum
intro: Polypodium dichotomum, also known as the American polypody or eastern polypody, is a species of fern found in the eastern regions of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polypodium dichotomum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a medical professional before using any herbal remedy.
